summary: KYC Verification System testing completed. All 18 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI tests for KYC Verification page, Admin KYC page, Login page, and Register page all passed.
seed_data_creation: Used existing test user with KYC documents
context_for_next_testing_agent: KYC Verification System fully tested. All endpoints working: /api/auth/kyc/upload, /api/auth/kyc/submit, /api/auth/kyc/status, /api/auth/kyc/pending, /api/auth/kyc/all, /api/auth/kyc/approve, /api/auth/kyc/resubmit. Admin can approve/reject users. Login correctly blocks unverified users with appropriate error messages (kyc_documents_missing, kyc_pending_approval, kyc_rejected:reason). Admins, managers, and enterprise users bypass KYC checks.

elements_found: 3 upload sections (ID Front, ID Back, Selfie)

login_page.kyc_error_handling: Verified - Login.js handles kyc_documents_missing, kyc_pending_approval, and kyc_rejected:reason errors

register_page.kyc_redirect: Verified - Register.js redirects to /kyc-verification after registration

features_tested: KYC Upload Page - User can see the KYC verification page at /kyc-verification with upload fields for ID front, ID back, and selfie - PASS
KYC Document Upload API - POST /api/auth/kyc/upload endpoint works for uploading documents - PASS
KYC Submit API - POST /api/auth/kyc/submit saves documents to user profile - PASS
KYC Status API - GET /api/auth/kyc/status returns correct status - PASS
Admin KYC Approval - Admin can approve KYC via POST /api/auth/kyc/approve - PASS
Admin KYC Rejection - Admin can reject KYC with reason via POST /api/auth/kyc/approve with approved=false - PASS
Login Flow - Verified users can login, unverified users get appropriate error messages - PASS
Admin KYC Page - Admin can see pending verifications at /admin/kyc - PASS
